seoTitle: Moorine Rock vs Morangup — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Moorine Rock and Morangup. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Moorine Rock vs Morangup: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Moorine Rock and Morangup.
heading: Moorine Rock vs Morangup — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Moorine Rock, Western Australia and Morangup, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Morangup has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Moorine Rock (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Moorine Rock or Morangup safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Moorine Rock has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Morangup scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Moorine Rock scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Morangup scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Moorine Rock or Morangup?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Morangup has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.38% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
